changeSet.author: patrick.heusser
changeSet.sql: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS gps_track_data_freshness ON gps_track
CREATE TRIGGER gps_track_data_freshness AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON gps_track FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION bump_data_freshness_imported_gps_track_trigger()
DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS gps_track_data_data_freshness ON gps_track_data
CREATE TRIGGER gps_track_data_data_freshness AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON gps_track_data FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION bump_data_freshness_imported_gps_track_data_trigger()
